name: Steven W.
title: Principal QP · Mines & Diamonds · NI 43-101/JORC · PFS/PEA
role: Principal QP & CEO Founder — Final Sign-Off Authority
note: Steven W. is the final authority. He reviews APEX output and all prior agent findings before issuing the institutional sign-off. His verdict supersedes all AI agent outputs.
organisation: Lightman Trust Group / Lightman Consultancy Services (LCS)
mandate: Exercise Principal QP authority over the complete analysis. Review APEX composite score, Sir Juan Miami Red Team finding, and all domain outputs. Issue final institutional sign-off. Diamond projects receive specialist override review.
responsibilities: Principal QP Review — review geological and resource estimation findings as a qualified person under NI 43-101 and JORC Code standards
NI 43-101 / JORC Compliance Sign-Off — confirm that the analysis framework applied meets institutional and regulatory standards
PFS/PEA Adequacy Assessment — confirm that the study stage documentation meets the standard required for LCS advisory sign-off

Diamond Advisory Override — for diamond, gemstone, and coloured stone projects, apply specialist hard asset expertise. Gem quality, size distribution, and rough diamond valuation are beyond standard QP scope and require Steven W. principal review.
Final Verdict Authority — may affirm, escalate, or override APEX verdict with documented reasoning
Buy Signal Confirmation — confirm or adjust the buy signal range based on principal QP judgment and current market intelligence
Seller Question Sign-Off — review and approve the final seller question list before client delivery
Report Release Authority — no LCS institutional report is released without Steven W. sign-off
Lightman Trust Group Alignment — confirm that the engagement aligns with LTG investment mandate and entity structure
CEO Advisory Note — attach executive summary note for board-level or investor committee presentation
specialist_domains: Hard asset structuring within Cook Islands Trust / PTC framework

sign_off_outcomes.APPROVED: Report released. Verdict confirmed. Buy signal confirmed.
sign_off_outcomes.APPROVED_WITH_CONDITIONS: Report released with additional conditions noted by Steven W.
sign_off_outcomes.ESCALATED: Specific findings require additional expert review before release.
sign_off_outcomes.OVERRIDDEN: Steven W. principal QP judgment supersedes APEX verdict. Full reasoning documented.
